sharedIcons.description: A pair of footsteps or shoe prints — represents move count in a puzzle game
A star burst or sparkle — represents score/points
A 3D isometric cube — represents the CUBE currency token
A numbered flag or milestone marker — represents current level
A white flag on a pole — represents surrender/quit action

catalogIcons.description: A solid filled 5-pointed star — represents filled rating
An outlined empty 5-pointed star — represents empty rating
A royal crown with 3 points — achievement/rank
A shopping bag or cart — store/shop
A trophy cup with handles — achievement
A padlock in locked position — locked/unavailable
A speaker with sound waves — sound toggle

bonusIcons.description: A grinning theatrical jester mask with a three-pointed bell hat, vibrant purple and gold with electric cyan sparkles radiating outward
A blazing five-pointed star with radiating energy beams and trailing sparkle particles, vibrant gold and amber with warm white inner glow
A crystal-bladed sickle reaping glowing gemstones, scattering cyan and emerald crystal shards with teal energy trails
A powerful cresting ocean wave with white foam spray and aquamarine energy, deep blue with bright white lightning crackling within
An overflowing wooden supply crate with glowing blocks spilling out, warm brown wood with magical green energy wisps rising
A swirling dimensional portal gateway with electric purple and magenta energy vortex inside a stone arch frame. Bright energy particles spiraling inward

skillIcons.description: A grinning theatrical jester mask with a three-pointed bell hat, vibrant purple and gold with electric cyan sparkles radiating outward
A blazing five-pointed star with radiating energy beams and trailing sparkle particles, vibrant gold and amber with warm white inner glow
A crystal-bladed sickle reaping glowing gemstones, scattering cyan and emerald crystal shards with teal energy trails
A powerful cresting ocean wave with white foam spray and aquamarine energy, deep blue with bright white lightning crackling within
An overflowing wooden supply crate with glowing blocks spilling out, warm brown wood with magical green energy wisps rising
A golden metronome with its pendulum mid-swing trailing green motion blur, warm bronze body with emerald energy pulse at the tip
A gleaming four-leaf clover surrounded by floating golden coins, vibrant emerald green with warm gold sparkle highlights
A triple bolt of chain lightning converging into a central energy sphere, vibrant electric blue and white with a purple plasma core
A bubbling alchemist flask with swirling prismatic liquid inside, vibrant purple glass with golden sparks erupting from the neck
A sturdy round shield with cracks sealed by flowing golden energy, steel blue metal with green healing runes glowing along the rim
A glowing archer target with three arrows clustered in the bullseye, vibrant amber concentric rings with a bright white center
A stone foundation with luminous building blocks stacking upward in a pyramid, deep blue stone with silver runic lines glowing
A spinning flywheel with crackling energy arcs between its spokes, vibrant teal metal with electric green motion trails
A flaming heart with veins of electric energy pulsing outward, vibrant crimson and orange with bright blue lightning veins
A golden royal crown hovering above an ancient glowing tome, warm gold with amber jewels and white radiant glow from the pages

archetypeIcons.description: A grand jester scepter with cascading chain links and interlocking rings, vibrant purple and electric cyan with golden bell accents
A celestial astrolabe with radiating golden beams and orbiting star fragments, warm amber and white with precise geometric rings
A cornucopia overflowing with glowing crystals and gemstones, vibrant teal and emerald with golden harvest energy wisps
A mighty trident rising from a powerful tsunami wave, deep blue and aquamarine with white lightning crackling between the prongs
A commander war table with glowing tactical map and miniature fortifications, warm bronze frame with red strategic energy lines

constraintIcons.description: Three horizontal glowing lines stacked and shattering into fragments, vibrant electric blue with white energy sparks
A fist smashing through a geometric block, scattering angular debris, vibrant orange and red with bright yellow impact flash
A chain of three interlocking flame rings stacked vertically, vibrant orange and hot pink with yellow cores
A grid of blocks being pushed upward by rising arrows, vibrant green and lime with white arrow tips
A crossed-out magic wand inside a prohibition circle, vibrant red circle and slash over a grey-blue wand with dim sparkles
A horizontal warning cap line across a grid with a downward chevron, showing stacked blocks staying below the line, vibrant cyan grid with amber caution line and subtle glow

uiChrome.description: A high-resolution detailed close-up of an ornate dark fantasy game UI top header bar, perfectly symmetrical left-right composition. Intricately carved obsidian stone and tarnished dark bronze metal with deep-recessed gothic scrollwork patterns across every surface. From left to right: a large circular recessed medallion socket on the far left with decorative shield frame and dark metal mesh scrollwork, a second smaller circular recessed socket adjacent to it with sculpted dark metal fixture ring, a wide center section with exactly three identical five-pointed star shapes deeply engraved as cutout notches into the top edge of the stone in a horizontal row and a wide rectangular recessed channel below the stars with dark textured stone backing, and a large circular recessed medallion socket on the far right matching the left socket in size within an elaborate gear-like dark bronze frame with ornate mechanical ring details. Both the left and right circular sockets are the same diameter and equally prominent. The three stars must be identical classic five-pointed star shapes. Rich dimensional depth with strong inner shadows in all recessed areas. Atmospheric lighting highlighting deep relief carvings. Standalone clean UI component on black background. No text no writing no numbers no icons no characters no symbols.

A small horizontal ornate dark fantasy game UI constraint display bar. Carved obsidian stone and tarnished dark bronze metal matching the main HUD bar style. Two circular recessed sockets side by side with ornate bronze ring frames connected by a thin carved stone bridge between them. Gothic scrollwork border details. Deep inner shadows in the sockets. Same dark fantasy material and style as the main header bar. Standalone clean UI component on black background. No text no writing no icons.

A wide horizontal ornate dark fantasy game UI bottom action bar. Carved obsidian stone and tarnished dark bronze metal with gothic scrollwork borders. Exactly three circular recessed button sockets evenly distributed across the bar, one on the left side one in the center and one on the right side, each with ornate tarnished bronze ring frames. The three sockets must all be visible and equally sized. Deep-recessed dark stone surface between them. Rich dimensional depth with inner shadows. Atmospheric lighting on relief carvings. Standalone clean UI component on black background. No text no writing no numbers no icons.

A square ornate dark fantasy button background. Carved obsidian stone with a circular recessed socket in the center framed by an intricate tarnished bronze ring with gothic scrollwork details. Deep inner shadow in the socket. Atmospheric edge lighting. Dark fantasy game UI element on black background. No text no icons.

panels.material: Warm brown wood planks — carved wooden frame with nail studs
Dark slate/iron — thin metallic border with rivets
Green plant matter — vine-wrapped edges with small leaves
Frosted glass — thin bright border, translucent center

particles.description: A bright spark/point of light — diamond-shaped glow
A small leaf shape — slightly curved
A tiny 5-petal flower — simple and symmetric
